case_title: JOHN ERICSON DASCO VS. LUIS COB COLLI

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-12-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-12-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT COLLI, LUIS COB
FILED CORRESPONDENCE FROM FARMER'S GROUP INSURANCE.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DASCO, JOHN ERICSON C/O LAW OFFICE OF K.J. PETSAS  PC AS TO DEFENDANT COLLI, LUIS COB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-12-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $120.00 SERVED MAY-25-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLLI, LUIS COB
DECLARATION UPDATED ADDRESS AND PHONE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT COLLI, LUIS COB

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDARS TO JUL-31-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM FARMER'S INSURANCE GROUP.
DECLARATION OF JOHN ERICSON DASCO RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF DASCO, JOHN ERICSON C/O LAW OFFICE OF K.J. PETSAS  PC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DASCO, JOHN ERICSON C/O LAW OFFICE OF K.J. PETSAS  PC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLLI, LUIS COB $4,920.86 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,115.86 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM FARMER'S INSURANCE GROUP.
